name: Confetti Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 20 Minutes Bake Time: 8 to 9 Minutes
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the Butter Flavor Crisco, brown sugar, milk, and vanilla. Mix at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Add the egg and beat until incorporated.
3. In another bowl, whisk together the flour, salt, and baking soda. Gradually add this mixture to the creamed ingredients in a low speed until fully combined.
4. Stir in the walnuts, semisweet chocolate chunks, white chocolate pieces, and milk chocolate chips. Form rounded tablespoon-sized mounds of dough on an ungreased baking sheet, spacing them about 3 inches apart.
5. Bake for 8 to 9 minutes at 375°F (the cookies will appear moist). Allow to cool for 2 minutes on the baking sheet. Remove from the sheet and transfer to a cooling rack.
Makes 2 dozen 3-inch cookies.
